title: Kagurabachi Sacred Steel
description: Brings the world of kagurabachi into minecraft
body:
PEAK IS HERE!!!!

This is a mod based on the manga Kagurabachi (aka PEAK!!!)

This Mod Adds Enchanted Blades, Spirit Energy Sorcery, bosses, rakuzaichi, npcs, Spirit Energy Training 

updates are coming with

More Npc's

structures

new sorcerys

Better combat + Epic fight compatability

BOSS LOCATIONS

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Blood Shed Hotel - Samura boss 1563 401

Rakuzaichi - Kyora boss 2089 12 

Theatre - Chihiro boss 981 -120

</details>

DEPENDENCIES 

[Gecko lib](https://modrinth.com/project/8BmcQJ2H) 

[Player animator](https://modrinth.com/project/gedNE4y2)

[Kleiders Custom Renderer API](https://modrinth.com/project/oaG6aa1j)

[Photon](https://modrinth.com/project/gzevkJbM)
 

Trello link HEAVY WIP VERY INCOMPLETE

[Trello](https://trello.com/b/ayJYsDwN)

 

EPILEPSY WARNING - THIS MOD ADDS IMPACT FRAMES WHICH FLASHES ALOT SO TURN OFF IMPACT FRAMES WITH THE GAME RULE

DISCLAIMER- i am aware of other mods using my assests i am ok with this but i do want to calrifie that all of my models where modeled by me and any other uses of the models are other authors using my models

 


 

Please join the discord to report any bugs 

Epicfight x Kagurabachi-Sacred Steel-Compatibility - Minecraft Data Packs - CurseForge EPIC FIGHT MOD COMPATIBILITY

Huge thanks to Flamme Sanabi for the rakuzaichi build and hopefully more soon

FOR UPDATES SUGGESTIONS JOIN THE OFFICAL DISCORD [Discord](https://discord.gg/uaNDxEwMuc)
